overall.description: Dark cyberpunk game footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with pink hair navigating through dimly lit industrial corridors, examining a holographic braindance interface, and entering a red-lit interrogation room to confront an NPC tied to a chair.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark corridor toward a distant glowing braindance interface

glowing holographic interface visible in the distance with pink neon bars
horizontal neon light strips along the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dark industrial corridor with metal walls. A glowing braindance interface is visible ahead, providing the primary light source in the otherwise pitch-black environment.

events.description: approaching the large holographic braindance editing interface that fills the view
moving past the interface and continuing down the corridor

agents.ego_description: examining the holographic braindance interface with its pink timeline bars and yellow circuit patterns before moving past it

entered.detail: large floating holographic screen displaying pink timeline bars and yellow circuit patterns

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a large holographic braindance editing interface that dominates the view with its pink and yellow neon display. After briefly examining it, the character moves past the interface and continues through the corridor.

corridor lighting shifts to yellow neon strips

exposed metal pipes running along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character continues through narrow service corridors, passing through a green-lit doorway and moving past industrial pipes. The lighting shifts between green and yellow neon accents as the character progresses deeper into the facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial interrogation room with red lighting and monitors

events.description: entering a larger room with red neon lighting and wall-mounted monitors
stopping near the NPC tied to the folding chair

television screens mounted on the walls displaying various images

metal work table with equipment on it
scattered trash and debris covering the concrete floor

segments.scene_description: The character enters a larger interrogation room bathed in red neon light with monitors on the walls. The floor is littered with debris. The character approaches an NPC who is tied to a metal folding chair, stopping to confront them.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark industrial facility that transitions from a pitch-black corridor into a stark, red-lit interrogation room. It begins with a character walking through a narrow metal hallway, drawn toward the glow of a holographic braindance interface that illuminates the darkness with pink and yellow neon. As the character moves past the display, the scene shifts into a series of service corridors where the lighting fluctuates between green and yellow accents amidst a network of industrial pipes. The camera then follows the character through a green-lit doorway and deeper into the facility before finally opening into a large room bathed in oppressive red neon. The movement concludes as the character navigates across a debris-strewn floor to confront an NPC tied to a metal folding chair.
